GetBidInstancePrice.rootDiskSizeInGb: System disk size of the VM instance to be created, in GB. Default is 40GB, range [40, 2048]GB. Sizes exceeding 40GB are charged at cloud disk pricing. The specified size must meet the minimum disk space requirement of the image used.
GetBidInstancePrice.rootDiskStorageType: System disk media type of the VM instance to be created. Defaults to SSD cloud disk. The disk type can be specified.
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList: List of CDS disks to be created
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList.storageType: CDS disk storage type. Default is hp1 (high-performance cloud disk). (Create instance, create spot instance, query spot instance market price)
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk capacity. Must be a positive integer, in GB, range 0~5120GB. (Create instance, create spot instance, query spot instance market price)
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList.name: Disk name. (Create instance)
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList.snapshotId: Snapshot ID. Applies when creating a disk from a snapshot; cannot be smaller than the snapshot size. (Create instance, create spot instance, query spot instance market price)
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList.deleteWithInstance: Delete disk with instance. Takes effect when billing is pay-as-you-go; default is false. For V2 API, the cdsAttributeActive parameter must be set to true when releasing the instance. (Create instance)
GetBidInstancePrice.createCdsList.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete automatic snapshots on release. (Create instance)
GetBidInstancePrice.networkCapacityInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps, range 0~200. 0 means no public IP is allocated.
GetBidInstancePrice.internetChargeType: Billing method for public network bandwidth
GetBidInstancePrice.purchaseCount: Number of VM instances to create in batch. Must be a positive integer. Optional, default is 1.
GetBidInstancePrice.zoneName: Availability zone for the query. Zone name format: "country-region-zone-letter", lowercase. Example: Beijing Zone A is "cn-bj-a". For dedicated instances, use the zone of the dedicated host; this field is not required.
